title: S1mple
extract: Oleksandr Olehovych Kostyliev, better known as s1mple, is a Ukrainian professional Counter-Strike 2 player who currently plays for BC.Game Esports. He is widely considered as one of the greatest players in Counter-Strike history, particularly in Counter-Strike: Global Offensive (CS:GO), having been ranked the No. 1 player in the world by HLTV in 2018, 2021 and 2022.
